scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 Tier-1-expressible legacy-parity read streams (forms, workspaces, themes, images) only; the legacy responses stream needs a per-form_id sub-resource fan-out (StreamHook territory per docs/migration/conventions.md's Tier-2 table) and is out of scope for this pass; the full Typeform API surface (webhooks, workspace/form mutation, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: legacy fans this stream out across a configured form_ids list (one request per form id) -- a sub-resource fan-out read requiring a Tier-2 StreamHook, not expressible in streams.json alone; deferred to a follow-up wave that adds internal/connectors/hooks/typeform
